DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lloyd D. Cowell, Esq. of SERVERSON & WERSON 398-3344 for cross-defendant GENERAL MOTORS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION demurring party
Defendant THOMAS ADAMS in propria persona and opposing party
* Opposition filed late. Matter was A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiff General Motors Acceptance Corporation's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint:
As to First cause of action Breach of Contact sustained with leave to amend to plead plaintiff's performance, defendants breach and damages.
As to the Second Cause of action for Fraud sustain with leave.
As to third cause of action for Forgery sustained with leave to amend.
As to fourth cause of action Deceptive trade practice sustained with leave. Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE (301); Court Reporter ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855
